challenge.title: Korak 2
challenge.description: Sada kreirajte drugi objekat, sa istim tri svojstva, da predstavlja drugi kultivar španske lavande nazvan Pretty Polly, i dodeli ga promenljivoj imena prettyPolly.

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should assign an object to your prettyPolly variable.
Your prettyPolly object should have a commonName property set to "Spanish lavender".
Your prettyPolly object should have a scientificName property set to "Lavandula stoechas".
Your prettyPolly object should have a cultivar property set to "Pretty Polly".

challengeFiles.name: script
